ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-15-2022 Continued To Mar-09-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-02-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court noted that notice is appropriate and that there are no objections. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated December 15, 2019 is admitted to probate. Paula Randall is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for March 23, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
